title: Force harmony
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{ForcePower |image=[[File:Force-harmony.jpg]] |name=Force harmony |alternate= |alignment=[[Light side of the Force/Legends|Light side of the Force]]''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'' |area=[[Control]], [[Sense]], and [[Alter (Jedi Order)|Alter]] |purpose= |inventor= |affiliation=[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'' }} {{Quote|One Jedi cannot conquer the dark side alone… I guess we've proved that. ''Together'', we were a Jedi fire that outshone his evil.''"
"''Two are more powerful than one… ''three'' are more powerful than two.|Luke Skywalker and Leia Organa Solo|audio=ForceHarmony-DE.flac|[[Dark Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Empire'' audio drama]]}} '''Force harmony''' was a [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]] [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] that allowed several [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-users]] to join their [[The Force/Legends|Force]] energies together in a pure and powerful manifestation of the light side. Bathing them in light side energies, the ability protected users from [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] powers and could [[Sever Force/Legends|sever]] opponents from the dark side entirely. [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], his [[Twin/Legends|twin]] [[Gender/Legends|sister]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], and the unborn [[Anakin Solo]] used this ability to separate the [[Cloning/Legends|reborn]] [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] from the dark side, causing the [[Force storm (wormhole)|Force storm]] he had summoned to go out of control, consuming him. ==Description== {{Dialogue|Leia Organa|Luke! I feel the Force.|Palpatine|No!|Luke Skywalker|Yes. It's surrounding the Emperor, cutting him off from all the power he poured into the storm.|attr=Leia Organa Solo and Luke Skywalker cut Palpatine off from the dark side|audio=LukeLeiaForceHarmony-DE.flac|src=}} [[File:WhatKindOfLamePowerIsHeartAnyway.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Palpatine is severed from the dark side.]] Force harmony was a [[Force power/Legends|Force ability]] designated in the families [[Control]], [[Sense]], and [[Alter (Jedi Order)|Alter]] that allowed several willing [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-users]] to manifest the power of the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]]. Once in effect, it bathed the users in the illumination of the light side and could act as a shield against [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] powers. The power could be kept up almost indefinitely, although a slight strain was put on whoever initiated the technique. For the duration that the ability was in use, the users would be united by [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] in all its intensity. The energies of the light side would flow through them in waves and give them complete clarity in the Force.[[Dark Empire endnotes|''Dark Empire'' endnotes]] The initiator could only link as many other Force-users to the chain as their Force energy allowed. The power could not cancel out the dark side, but it could distract its practitioners and make their actions more difficult to perform, and in some cases, [[Sever Force/Legends|cut them off]] from the dark side completely.[[Dark Empire 6|''Dark Empire'' 6]] Force harmony could also interrupt dark side abilities already in use by engulfing their users in waves of light side energy; those powers inherently difficult to control, such as [[Force storm (wormhole)|Force storm]], were especially susceptible to this interference. The proximity between users in the chain, strength in the Force, and [[Blood/Legends|blood]] relation were all factors that could affect the intensity of this ability. In order to begin Force harmony, the initiator had to be adept in [[Life Sense]] and [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathy]]. Relatively powerful [[Derriphan (creature)|Derriphans]], creatures of the dark side, could be defeated by a group of Force-users in a Force harmony chain by transferring light side Force energy to the creature.''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'' ==Applications== {{Quote|…A Jedi-killer wants to tame her. Now the dark side comes to claim her. She must join with her brother to combat this thief, before the Jedi come to grief.|The second half of Bodo Baas' prophecy|audio=BaasProphecyPart2-DE.flac|}} [[File:ForceStormEclipse2.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Sidious is consumed by his own storm.]] After [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] resurrected himself in a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] body[[Dark Empire 5|''Dark Empire'' 5]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]],''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' he brought the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to the dark side and trained him as his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]]. Skywalker's [[Twin/Legends|twin]] [[Gender/Legends|sister]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], traveled to Palpatine's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']], and brought her brother back to the light side. Once Palpatine summoned an incredibly destructive Force storm to [[Battle of Pinnacle Base|annihilate]] the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] at [[Pinnacle Base]], Skywalker and Organa Solo brought their Force energies together and enveloped Palpatine in a wave of light side energy. Augmented by their [[Force-bond/Legends|twin bond]] and the strength of Organa Solo's [[Anakin Solo|third child]], who was still in the [[Womb/Legends|womb]], the twins were easily able to cut Palpatine off from the dark side, causing him to lose control of his storm. The storm consumed Palpatine and the ''Eclipse'', but not before Skywalker and Organa Solo escaped the doomed [[Starship/Legends|ship]] unharmed. ==Users== {{Quote|''We'' can do it. That's what the holocron meant. Let ''me'' add my power to ''yours''.|Leia Organa Solo, to Luke Skywalker|audio=LeiaPowerOfHeart-DE.flac|}} Several [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Knights and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Masters]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Old Jedi Order]], such as [[Ood Bnar]], [[Arca Jeth]], [[Thon]],''[[Jedi Academy Training Manual]]'' [[Vima-Da-Boda]], [[Taj Junak]],''[[Lords of the Expanse]]'' and [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], possessed the ability to initiate Force harmony.''[[The Movie Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' Additionally, the ancient [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Freedon Nadd]], a master of both Jedi and [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] abilities, could conduct Force harmony.''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'' states that [[Freedon Nadd]] knew every [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] included therein, among them being Force harmony. Elite members of the [[Emperor's Shadow Guard]] led by [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] [[Valin Draco]] were also known to possess the ability.{{DoD|Jaws of the Sarlacc}} Leia Organa Solo first learned of the ability from the [[Tedryn Holocron]]. The [[Holocron/Legends|holocron's]] [[Gatekeeper/Legends|gatekeeper]], [[Bodo Baas]], told her of a [[Force vision/Legends|prophecy]] related to him by his [[Bodo Baas's Master|Master]] almost a [[Millennium/Legends|thousand]] [[Standard year/Legends|years]] ago, which predicted that Skywalker and Organa Solo would defeat Palpatine together. Organa Solo realized the meaning behind the prophecy after confronting Palpatine on the ''Eclipse'', and joined her Force energy with Skywalker's. Skywalker, too, realized that the only way to combat Palpatine's dark side energies was through pure light and joined his sister. Combining their powers with Organa Solo's unborn child, Anakin Solo, the twins were able to vanquish Palpatine. ==Behind the scenes== Force harmony first appeared in the [[Dark Empire 6|sixth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, written by [[Tom Veitch]], illustrated by [[Cam Kennedy]], and published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[October 20]], [[1992]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54062/star_wars_dark_empire_1991_6|text=Star Wars: Dark Empire (1991) #6}} It was also referenced in the issue's [[Dark Empire endnotes|endnotes]]. It was later named and given an expansion in [[Michael Allen Horne]]'s ''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'' and made an appearance in the [[Dark Empire (audio drama)|audio adaptation]] of ''Dark Empire''. ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 125]]'' incorrectly describes this ability as a "storm of light-side energy," mistaking it for the Force storm that destroys the ''Eclipse''.{{FactFile|125|ECL 1-2|''Eclipse-''class Super Star Destroyer}} ==Appearances== *{{DoD|Jaws of the Sarlacc}} {{Mo}} *[[Dark Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Empire'' audio drama]] *[[Dark Empire 6|''Dark Empire'' 6]] {{1st}}
